home.title: Kwa Miganda
home.subtitle: Where Burundian Heritage Meets Nature
home.description: A cultural eco-retreat in the hills of Mwaro where visitors discover ancestral traditions, nature, and authentic hospitality.
home.storyTitle: Where the wisdom of ancestral Burundi meets the serenity of nature.
home.storyDescription1: Visitors are welcomed into a traditional Rugo — the ancestral homestead — where they discover rituals, music, crafts, and medicinal plants passed down through generations.
home.storyDescription2: Kwa Miganda is both a cultural preservation project and a peaceful retreat, nestled in the green hills of Mwaro province.

heritageVisit.title: Heritage Visit
heritageVisit.description: Explore the traditional Rugo homestead and discover ancestral Burundian architecture and daily life.

culturalExperience.title: Cultural Experience
culturalExperience.description: Immerse yourself in traditional music, drumming, poetry, and storytelling ceremonies.

natureWalks.title: Nature Walks
natureWalks.description: Walk through the rolling green hills of Mwaro, guided by local experts.

botanicalGarden.title: Botanical Garden
botanicalGarden.description: Discover indigenous medicinal plants and learn about traditional healing practices.

landscapes.label: NATURE & LANDSCAPES
landscapes.title: Explore the Landscapes of Mwaro
landscapes.description: Discover the breathtaking natural beauty surrounding Kwa Miganda — from rolling hills to lush forests.

hills.title: Rolling Hills
hills.description: Endless green hills stretching across the horizon, offering panoramic views of Burundi's highlands.

forests.title: Lush Forests
forests.description: Dense tropical forests filled with indigenous flora and fauna, perfect for nature walks and bird watching.

trails.title: Mountain Trails
trails.description: Scenic hiking trails winding through the mountains, revealing hidden waterfalls and stunning vistas.

plantations.title: Tea Plantations
plantations.description: Vibrant tea plantations cascading down the hillsides, showcasing Burundi's agricultural heritage.

village.title: Traditional Village
village.description: Authentic Burundian villages where ancient customs and community life thrive in harmony with nature.

sunset.title: Sunset Views
sunset.description: Breathtaking sunset vistas painting the sky in golden hues over the rolling hills of Mwaro.

cta.label: PLAN YOUR JOURNEY
cta.title: Plan Your Visit to Kwa Miganda
cta.description: Begin your journey into Burundi's heritage and nature.

heritage.label: CULTURAL HERITAGE
heritage.title: A Living Testament to Burundian Tradition
heritage.description: Kwa Miganda is more than a destination — it is a preservation of identity, where every hut, plant, and song tells a story of resilience and beauty.

architecture.title: Traditional Architecture
architecture.description: The Rugo compound preserves ancestral building techniques using earth, wood, and thatch — a living museum of Burundian domestic life.

plants.title: Medicinal Plants
plants.description: Our botanical garden holds dozens of indigenous species used for centuries in traditional healing, documented and maintained by local elders.

music.title: Music & Poetry
music.description: Experience the rhythmic power of Burundian drumming and the oral poetry tradition that carries stories across generations.

community.title: Community
community.description: Kwa Miganda directly supports local families, ensuring that cultural knowledge is preserved and shared with the world.

experience.title: Our Experiences
experience.subtitle: Discover the Living Heritage of Burundi
experience.description: Immerse yourself in authentic experiences that connect you with nature, culture, and the warmth of Burundian hospitality.

hero.title: Authentic Experiences
hero.description: From cultural immersion to nature exploration, discover what makes Kwa Miganda unique.

cultural.title: Cultural Experiences
cultural.description: Dive deep into Burundian traditions and heritage

nature.title: Nature & Adventure
nature.description: Explore the breathtaking landscapes of Mwaro

wellness.title: Wellness & Relaxation
wellness.description: Rejuvenate your body and mind in harmony with nature

learning.title: Learning & Discovery
learning.description: Expand your knowledge through interactive experiences

traditionalMusic.title: Traditional Music & Dance
traditionalMusic.description: Experience the rhythm of Burundi through traditional drumming, singing, and dance performances that tell stories of our ancestors.

rugoVisit.title: Traditional Rugo Visit
rugoVisit.description: Step into the heart of Burundian rural life as you explore a traditional homestead, learning about ancestral architecture and daily rituals.

natureWalks.title: Guided Nature Walks
natureWalks.description: Discover the diverse flora and fauna of Mwaro's hills with expert local guides who share traditional ecological knowledge.

botanicalGarden.title: Medicinal Plants Garden
botanicalGarden.description: Learn about traditional Burundian medicine as you explore our botanical garden featuring indigenous healing plants.

cookingWorkshop.title: Traditional Cooking Workshop
cookingWorkshop.description: Join our chefs in preparing authentic Burundian dishes using local ingredients and traditional cooking methods.

storytelling.title: Oral Storytelling Session
storytelling.description: Gather around the fire as elders share ancient tales, proverbs, and wisdom passed down through generations.

birdwatching.title: Bird Watching Tour
birdwatching.description: Observe over 200 species of birds in their natural habitat, including rare species found only in Burundi's highlands.

meditation.title: Mindfulness & Meditation
meditation.description: Find inner peace through guided meditation sessions in serene natural settings overlooking the hills.

craftWorkshop.title: Traditional Craft Workshop
craftWorkshop.description: Learn ancestral crafts like basket weaving, pottery, or traditional jewelry making from skilled local artisans.

sunriseYoga.title: Sunrise Yoga Session
sunriseYoga.description: Start your day with yoga and meditation as the sun rises over Burundi's magnificent hills.

villageTour.title: Local Village Tour
villageTour.description: Visit neighboring communities to understand rural Burundian life, meet local families, and support community projects.

photography.title: Photography Workshop
photography.description: Capture the beauty of Burundi through guided photography sessions focusing on landscapes, culture, and wildlife.

booking.title: Book Your Experience
booking.description: Ready to embark on your Burundian adventure? Choose from our curated experiences.
booking.note: All experiences can be customized. Contact us for private groups or special requests.

expertGuides.title: Expert Local Guides
expertGuides.description: Learn from knowledgeable guides who are passionate about sharing their culture and heritage.

smallGroups.title: Small Group Sizes
smallGroups.description: Intimate experiences ensure personalized attention and meaningful connections.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Tourism
sustainable.description: All activities support local communities and environmental conservation.

flexible.title: Flexible Scheduling
flexible.description: Experiences can be arranged around your schedule and preferences.

lodge.title: Our Lodge
lodge.subtitle: Authentic Comfort in the Heart of Nature
lodge.description: Discover our comfortable and authentic lodge, nestled in the heart of nature. A perfect blend of modern comfort and traditional Burundian charm.
lodge.heroDescription: Experience genuine hospitality in our eco-friendly lodge designed for ultimate comfort and cultural immersion.
lodge.amenitiesSubtitle: Everything you need for a perfect stay

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.description: Each of our carefully designed rooms offers stunning views of Burundi's lush hills and traditional Burundian decor.

standardRoom.title: Standard Room
standardRoom.description: Comfortable room with private bathroom, hot water, and traditional décor

deluxeRoom.title: Deluxe Room
deluxeRoom.description: Spacious room with king bed, panoramic windows, and traditional sitting area

suiteRoom.title: Suite
suiteRoom.description: Luxury suite with separate living area, premium amenities, and breathtaking views

dining.title: Dining Experience
dining.description: Our restaurant serves authentic Burundian and international cuisine prepared with fresh local ingredients.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.description: Traditional and continental breakfast featuring local specialties

lunch.title: Lunch
lunch.description: À la carte menu with traditional Burundian dishes and international options

dinner.title: Dinner
dinner.description: Gourmet dinners showcasing the best of local and fusion cuisine

vegetarian.title: Vegetarian Options
vegetarian.description: Full range of vegetarian and vegan dishes available on request

wellness.title: Wellness & Relaxation
wellness.description: Rejuvenate your mind and body with our comprehensive wellness offerings.

spa.title: Traditional Spa
spa.description: Treatments inspired by traditional Burundian wellness practices

massage.title: Massage Therapy
massage.description: Professional massage treatments to relieve tension and stress

yoga.title: Yoga Classes
yoga.description: Morning and sunset yoga sessions in serene natural settings

meditation.title: Meditation Sessions
meditation.description: Guided meditation to find inner peace and mindfulness

activities.title: On-Site Activities
activities.description: Engage with nature and culture through our carefully curated activities.

hiking.title: Guided Hiking
hiking.description: Explore the beautiful landscapes surrounding our lodge

bird.title: Bird Watching
bird.description: Observe over 200 species of birds in their natural habitat

cultural.title: Cultural Programs
cultural.description: Interactive sessions with local guides and artisans

bonfire.title: Evening Bonfire
bonfire.description: Gather around the fire for stories, music, and stargazing

authentication.title: Authentic Experience
authentication.description: Built with traditional methods and modern comfort in mind

ecoFriendly.title: Eco-Friendly
ecoFriendly.description: Sustainable practices committed to environmental preservation

localStaff.title: Local Staff
localStaff.description: Warm hospitality from knowledgeable community members

connectivity.title: Connectivity
connectivity.description: WiFi available in common areas for staying in touch

safety.title: Safe Environment
safety.description: 24/7 security and medical facilities on premises

parking.description: Secure parking facilities for all guests

booking.description: Ready for an unforgettable experience? Reserve your room today.
booking.note: Best rates guaranteed. Contact us directly for group bookings and special packages.

history.title: History
history.description: Discover the rich and fascinating history of our region.

culture.description: Dive into local traditions and culture preserved for generations.

conservation.title: Conservation
conservation.description: Our commitment to preserving the environment and cultural heritage.

location.byCar: By car: 2 hours from the main city

footer.description: A cultural heritage eco-retreat in the hills of Mwaro, Burundi. Where ancestral tradition meets the serenity of nature.
